images.title: Plouer-sur-Rance-La-Cale-plage-balacoire-byRundvald.jpg
images.description: The small beach, equipped with a swing and a slide, is located next to the slipway at Plouër-sur-Rance in Côtes d’Armor (Brittany, France), facing the Rance estuary. At high tide, the seawater swimming pool is submerged.

images.title: Boat on Rance River estuary.jpg
images.description: Un bateau arrimé sur le bord de l'estuaire de la Rance.

images.title: Plouer-sur-Rance-La-Cale-plage-piscine-byRundvald.jpg
images.description: The wing of the bar-restaurant "La Cale" reserved for receptions, with the small beach and the swimming pool of the slipway (here, totally submerged by the high tide) of Plouër-sur-Rance in Côtes d'Armor (Brittany, France).

images.title: Plouer swimming pool cleaning 2014 zoom.jpg
images.description: Nettoyage de la piscine située à la cale de Plouër-sur-Rance

images.description: Nettoyage de la piscine située à la cale de Plouër-sur-Rance

images.title: Moon on Rance river 2014.jpg
images.description: Reflet de la lune sur l'estuaire de la Rance

images.title: Sunrise on Rance River estuary.jpg
images.description: Sunrise on the estuary of Rance River in France from Ploüer-sur-Rance.

images.description: La commune de Mordreuc et sa plage vue depuis la cale de Ploüer-sur-Rance, de l'autre côté de la Rance.

images.title: Cale plouer hugin 2014.jpg
images.description: Vacationers swim in the Rance estuary at low tide while the pool is being cleaned.

images.title: Port plouer depuis la rance.jpg
images.description: Vue du port de plaisance et du moulin à marée de Plouër-sur-Rance. Photo prise depuis un kayak lors de la traversée de l'estuaire de la Rance.

images.title: Plouer-sur-Rance-club-nautique-byRundvald.jpg
images.description: The Plouër-sur-Rance nautical club (Côtes d'Armor, Brittany, France) near the marina and the slipway giving access to the Rance estuary.

images.title: Plouer-sur-Rance-voiliers-estuaire-byRundvald.jpg
images.description: Sailboats moored at the pontoons of the Plouër-sur-Rance marina in Côtes d’Armor (Brittany, France).

images.description: Sailboats moored at the pontoons of the Plouër-sur-Rance marina in Côtes d’Armor (Brittany, France).
